title: toddalia nobilis
intro: Toddalia nobilis is a plant species also known as the 'Native Gardenia' or 'False Gardenia', native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Toddalia nobilis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Toddalia nobilis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
